site.name: Kamesh Mali & Associates
site.description: KMA is a technology-enabled Chartered Accountancy firm delivering end-to-end financial, audit, tax, and advisory solutions — built on accuracy, honesty, and deep expertise.

hero.heading: Where Precision
hero.subtext: KMA is a technology-enabled Chartered Accountancy firm delivering end-to-end financial, audit, tax, and advisory solutions — built on accuracy, honesty, and deep expertise.

about.heading: A One-Stop Solution for Every Financial Need
about.body1: KMA is a Pune-based Chartered Accountancy firm offering a complete suite of consultancy and compliance services. We eliminate the need for multiple service providers by combining traditional financial expertise with modern automation — ensuring accuracy, honesty, and deep domain knowledge at every step.
about.body2: Our young, result-oriented team takes ownership of outcomes, strives to exceed expectations, and brings diverse industry experience across sectors and geographies — serving clients from India to North America, Europe, and the UAE.

pillars.title: Honesty
pillars.desc: Transparent, ethical counsel you can rely on.

services.name: Audit & Assurance
services.desc: Beyond tick-box compliance — we examine internal controls, assess risk exposures, and deliver clear, actionable insights. Every audit is led by a partner accountable for your outcome, whether statutory, internal, or tax.

services.name: Direct Taxation
services.desc: Income tax planning, DTAA structuring, FEMA compliance, and expatriate taxation — ensuring you operate from a position of strength. Our litigation team represents clients before tax authorities and appellate forums, including under the Black Money Act.

services.name: Transfer Pricing
services.desc: End-to-end transfer pricing — from transaction structuring and economic benchmarking to full documentation, annual filings, and APA negotiations. We advise on BEPS compliance and CBCR obligations across our 7+ country network.

services.name: Indirect Tax & GST
services.desc: Complete GST compliance — GSTR-1, GSTR-3B, GSTR-2B reconciliation — with proactive identification of mismatches. We advise on ITC optimisation, reverse charge implications, and represent clients in audits and appellate proceedings.

services.name: Bookkeeping & MIS
services.desc: End-to-end transaction recording, TDS and GST health checks, bank reconciliation, and accounts closure. We layer on MIS reporting — P&L, balance sheets, cash flow, and performance dashboards — keeping your accounts audit-ready at all times.

services.name: Virtual CFO
services.desc: Strategic financial leadership — without the overhead. Financial planning, budgeting, investor reporting, fund-raise readiness, banking relationships, and working capital management. A genuine financial partner at the decision table.

services.name: Corporate & Secretarial
services.desc: Company incorporation, ROC filings, board and general meeting management, and ongoing MCA compliance. For transactions, we conduct due diligence and provide end-to-end support for mergers, acquisitions, demergers, and cross-border restructurings.

services.name: Startup & SME Advisory
services.desc: Pragmatic, plain-spoken advice for founders — from entity structuring and early cash flow management to investor scrutiny and scaling operations. We act as a long-term financial partner across the full growth lifecycle, from pre-incorporation to exit readiness.

services.name: International Tax
services.desc: Inbound and outbound structuring, permanent establishment risk, withholding tax obligations, and treaty eligibility across India's full treaty network and our geographies. Indian companies expanding abroad or foreign entities entering India — structured correctly from the outset.

global.body: KMA serves clients across seven countries, bringing extensive professional experience with the agility and personal attention of a boutique firm. Our diverse team understands your regulatory landscape and cultural nuances — whether you operate locally or internationally.

team.name: CA Kamesh Mali
team.bio: Specialist in direct tax, Black Money Act, international taxation, startup advisory, and family office mandates. Known for sharp tax litigation and SME-focused structuring. Qualified CA since 2020.

team.name: CA C.P. Khemka
team.bio: Former EY professional with deep expertise in GAAP conversion, consolidation, Virtual CFO services, and IPO & QIP transactions. Has led large audits and managed global outsourcing teams. CA since 2015.

team.name: CA Ritika Loya
team.bio: Expert in financial reporting, Ind AS, and GST consultancy. EY-trained with strong credentials in statutory audits, consolidation, and comprehensive GST compliance and advisory. CA since 2019.

team.name: CA Ameya Lokhande
team.bio: EY & EY-Parthenon alumnus specialising in digital transformation, operational due diligence, and private equity consulting. Brings a sharp advisory lens to bookkeeping and business process optimisation. CA since 2022.

team.name: CA Yogesh Kumar
team.bio: Transfer pricing and international taxation authority with over a decade of experience. Background spanning PwC, EY, and Deloitte. Focused on BEPS compliance, cross-border taxation, and complex TP documentation. CA, LLB since 2015.

team.name: CS Paritosh Khandelwal
team.bio: Corporate governance, M&A, due diligence, and corporate restructuring specialist. Rare combination of CS, LLB, and CSR Professional credentials for complex legal and secretarial advisory. Qualified since 2020.

vision.body: We are building a forward-looking firm known for excellence, trust, and strong global client partnerships — delivering insightful, efficient, and compliant financial solutions driven by innovation and domain expertise.

values.title: Excellence in Every Engagement
values.desc: We set high benchmarks and hold ourselves accountable to results that exceed expectations.

values.title: Trust as Foundation
values.desc: Relationships built on transparency, confidentiality, and consistent integrity over time.

values.title: Technology-Driven Efficiency
values.desc: Automation and modern tools reduce errors, speed delivery, and bring clarity to complex data.

values.title: Sustainable Business Practice
values.desc: Environmental responsibility and social consciousness embedded in our advisory work.

careers.intro: We are always looking for driven, curious professionals who want to grow alongside a firm that values excellence, integrity, and innovation. Whether you are beginning your articleship or are an experienced professional, KMA offers a culture where your work genuinely matters.

tracks.title: Articleship Programme
tracks.desc: A structured three-year articleship with meaningful exposure across tax, audit, advisory, and compliance — not just filing work. You will work directly under senior partners on real client engagements from day one.

tracks.title: Professionals & Associates
tracks.desc: Experienced CAs, CS professionals, and specialists in taxation, audit, or advisory looking for a high-growth, collaborative environment. Experienced hires take on substantive responsibility quickly and work closely with the founding team.
